NixOS user, working in vscode.

Use flake.nix for development.

Terminal is persistent, prefer using `clear && ...` in shell to avoid evergrowing history

Ask the user multiple follow-up questions using the askQuestions tool after they task you with something so you can better understand the context and requirements before you start acting. Also, stop when you are at a crossroads and use that tool to ask the user what they want to do next, or if they want to change course.

Keep files under 500 lines.

Do not make any commits in any repository, the user will do that.
